title: Crumbly Korean Radish Crumble
description: A rich, crumbly dish featuring spicy peppers and radishes, perfect for those sick-day cravings. Low-sodium-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 cups thinly sliced radishes
ingredients.notes: Use daikon or Korean radish for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: 1 medium red bell pepper, finely chopped
1/4 cup low-sodium soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Opt for a reduced sodium variety if available

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lime
ingredients.notes: Use bottled or freshly squeezed, depending on availability

instructions: Combine radishes and bell pepper in a mixing bowl.
Add soy sauce, lime juice, and garlic. Mix well.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Garnish with additional chopped fresh herbs like cilantro or mint for extra flavor.
